title: Introduction to Strudel
description: Learn live coding with Strudel patterns — step by step.

steps.title: Welcome
steps.content:
# Welcome to Strudel

This tutorial will teach you live coding with Strudel patterns.

Press **Play** to begin.

steps.title: Change the note
steps.content: Replace `c4` with `e4` in the editor and press Play again.
